name: onedrive-overquota-report
title: Identify OneDrive Users Over License-Based Storage Quota
shortDescription: Identifies OneDrive for Business users who are over their expected storage quota based on their assigned license tier, with special handling for EDU A1 enforcement.
longDescription: Microsoft Graph-based report that identifies OneDrive users whose storage usage exceeds their license-based expected quota.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Identify OneDrive Users Over License-Based Storage Quota

references.name: Want to learn more about Microsoft Graph PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the Microsoft Graph PowerShell SDK documentation site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.
